---
title: "Experience"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-section">

  <!-- Mobosoft -->
  <div class="exp-card">
    <div class="exp-header">
      <div class="exp-title-block">
        <h3 class="exp-role">Founder & CEO</h3>
        <p class="exp-company">Mobosoft Inc. · San Diego, CA</p>
      </div>
      <span class="exp-date">Dec 2022 – Present</span>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-body">
      <ul>
        <li>Designed and launched cloud infrastructure services including VPS hosting, dedicated servers, and IPv4 resource management — building scalable, high-availability platform foundations supporting multiple service lines.</li>
        <li>Led integration of third-party payment processing APIs and B2B partner systems, managing API lifecycle requirements, service-level expectations, and cross-partner data flows.</li>
        <li>Developed a pay-per-mile EV rental platform from concept through market validation, owning the full product roadmap, technical requirements, and cross-functional execution.</li>
        <li>Applied data analytics to monitor platform performance and drive continuous improvement in service reliability and operational efficiency.</li>
      </ul>
      <div class="exp-tags">
        <span class="tag">Cloud Infrastructure</span>
        <span class="tag">API Integration</span>
        <span class="tag">Product Roadmap</span>
        <span class="tag">AWS/VPS</span>
        <span class="tag">Data Analytics</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Didehbannet -->
  <div class="exp-card">
    <div class="exp-header">
      <div class="exp-title-block">
        <h3 class="exp-role">Co-Founder & CEO</h3>
        <p class="exp-company">Didehbannet ISP · Iran</p>
      </div>
      <span class="exp-date">Jul 2004 – Jul 2022 · 18 yrs</span>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-body">
      <ul>
        <li>Built a proprietary CRM platform from scratch — architected user authentication, automated billing workflows, and API integrations connecting to multiple third-party systems at enterprise scale.</li>
        <li>Designed and maintained integration frameworks supporting 50,000+ POS terminal connections, ensuring high-availability data flows and real-time connectivity.</li>
        <li>Delivered city-scale fiber optic infrastructure, defining platform architecture standards and phased rollout strategy for long-term reliability.</li>
        <li>Deployed a full Wi-Fi platform across Bahonar University — supporting 20,000+ active users with secure, scalable network services and centralized authentication.</li>
        <li>Led B2B partnership negotiations and partner-facing API integrations, translating complex technical requirements into clear product roadmaps.</li>
        <li>Directed IT strategy, network security compliance, and 24/7 service reliability for a regional telecommunications platform.</li>
      </ul>
      <div class="exp-tags">
        <span class="tag">CRM Platform</span>
        <span class="tag">50,000+ POS Terminals</span>
        <span class="tag">Fiber Optic Infrastructure</span>
        <span class="tag">API Lifecycle</span>
        <span class="tag">High-Availability Systems</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Featured Project -->
  <div class="exp-card">
    <div class="exp-header">
      <div class="exp-title-block">
        <h3 class="exp-role">Campus Foot Traffic & Routing Analysis</h3>
        <p class="exp-company">UCSD × OccuSpace Capstone Project</p>
      </div>
      <span class="exp-date">Jan 2026 – Jun 2026</span>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-body">
      <p><em>Python · GIS · Mapbox · Spatial Analytics · Data Pipelines</em></p>
      <ul>
        <li>Built data pipelines and probabilistic zone-to-zone transition models from anonymized device-level movement data across UCSD campus.</li>
        <li>Delivered descriptive, predictive, and prescriptive analytics outputs translating complex platform data into actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders.</li>
        <li>Developed interactive GIS dashboards for UCSD Facilities and Campus Planning.</li>
      </ul>
      <div class="exp-tags">
        <span class="tag">Python</span>
        <span class="tag">GIS</span>
        <span class="tag">Mapbox</span>
        <span class="tag">Spatial Analytics</span>
        <span class="tag">Data Pipelines</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
